issuer: NESO and the three GB TOs (NGET, SPT, SHET)
authority: Multiparty agreement; compliance is a licence condition for NESO and the TOs
summary: Defines the operational, commercial, and procedural interface between NESO (as system operator) and the three transmission owners (NGET, SPT, SHET). Covers how NESO instructs TOs to build/modify/outage the network, how outages are planned, how real-time switching occurs, and how costs are settled between SO and TO.
scope: Section A — Outage planning and real-time operations at the SO/TO interface
Section C — Commercial arrangements and charges between SO and TOs
Section D — Safety from the System, safety rules at the SO/TO boundary
Section F — Construction, energisation, commissioning processes
Section K — SO-TO Code modifications governance
Section L — Network planning and design coordination

keyParts.name: Outage Planning Procedure
keyParts.detail: Year-ahead and week-ahead outage plans, NESO's 'Transmission Access' decisions.

keyParts.name: Construction Agreement interface
keyParts.detail: How TOs deliver what NESO commits to customers under CUSC.

keyParts.name: Bilateral Connection process
keyParts.detail: Roles of SO vs TO when a customer connects: SO does offer and queue, TO designs and builds.

keyParts.name: Data exchange
keyParts.detail: Network model, ratings, protection settings, real-time telemetry.

whoCares: TOs only (does not bind generators directly)
